_publications._publicationTitle: Machine Learning of Allosteric Effects: The Analysis of Ligand-Induced Dynamics to Predict Functional Effects in TRAP1.

_contextSnippet: We focused on residue-level solvation, contacts, and distances obtained from four inherently flexible regions of the buckled and straight monomers
details: Successfully used for MD trajectory analysis and feature extraction from TRAP1 simulations to generate training data for machine learning models
